title: Page — one dashboard page
description: A page is a container of panels. Per ADAPTER_CONTRACT.md §4 and LAYER_GRAPH_BUILDER_SPEC.md §5. The page itself has no scientific behaviour — its job is to host panels in a layout. Visibility / composition is decided by the librarian via the page's primary hook (hook_id below).

hook_id.description: Primary hook this page resolves on load. FK into hook_registry.hook_id.

panels.description: Ordered list of panel_ids the page lays out. Each panel_id must resolve to a panel_v1 entry.

package_id.description: Optional owning package. A page may aggregate panels across packages.
